final:
module bin_counter(
    input       obf_clk,
    input       rst,
    output reg [3:0] count
);

    always @(posedge obf_clk or posedge rst) begin
        if(rst) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end
        else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

endmodule
